name: lobbyist-tracker
description: Weekly diff of Australian lobbyist registers (federal + states). A pubdiff tracker.

scripts.scrape:collect: pnpm run fetch && pnpm run parse && pnpm run index-update && pnpm run diff
scripts.scrape:render: pnpm run feed && pnpm run build-site-data
scripts.scrape: pnpm run scrape:collect && pnpm run scrape:render
scripts.scrape:full: pnpm run scrape && pnpm run post
